lavender-latte.name: Lavender Latte
instructions: Steep the lavender in the hot water for 7 minutes.
Froth the milk by adding it to a resealable jar. Shake vigorously until many bubbles form. Then, microwave the milk for 45 seconds to 1 minute, which will help create stable bubbles.
Remove the lavender, then stir in the agave and frothed milk.
Top with more lavender, if desired.
Enjoy!

leftover-turkey-melts.name: Leftover-turkey Melts

ingredients.item:
(loosely packed) shredded leftover skinless roast turkey
meat (about 12 oz.)
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Mix 3 medium celery stalks, finely chopped (about ⅔ cup), 4 scallions, thinly sliced, zest of 1 large lemon, 3 cups (loosely packed) shredded leftover skinless roast turkey meat (about 12 oz.), ¾ cup coarsely chopped drained pickled peppers (such as jalapeños), ½ cup finely chopped dill and/or parsley, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 cup mayonnaise, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper in a large bowl until combined and turkey is finely shredded. Taste and season with more salt and/or pepper if needed.

Arrange 8 slices sourdough bread on a cutting board or rimmed baking sheet. Using a small offset spatula or butter knife, spread 1 side of each slice with a thin layer of mayonnaise (about 1 tsp. per slice). Turn mayonnaise side down. Top 4 slices of bread with 4 slices American cheese, breaking cheese to fit as needed. Divide turkey mixture evenly over cheese. Top with remaining 4 American cheese slices, then close up sandwiches with remaining bread, arranging mayonnaise side out.

Heat a large cast-iron skillet over medium. Working in
batches as needed, toast sandwiches, pressing lightly with a spatula to ensure full
contact with pan and turning halfway through, until bread is golden brown and cheese is
melted, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking
sheet (this will prevent sandwiches from getting soggy) and let cool 2 minutes.
Slice sandwiches in half and transfer to plates. Serve with dill pickles and potato chips if desired.

7. Preheated 170 degrees cook until the oven frozes.
8. Serve after arrival.

lemon-curd.name: Lemon Curd
instructions: Bring a medium pot of water to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-high. Whisk lemon juice, sugar, and eggs, in a medium heatproof bowl; place over pot of simmering water and cook, whisking constantly, until mixture has thickened, 5–6 minutes.
Remove mixture from heat and transfer to a blender. With blender running, slowly add butter, 1 piece at a time; blend until butter is completely incorporated.
Transfer lemon curd to a small bowl and place a piece of plastic wrap directly on the surface of the curd. Chill for at least 3 hours before serving.

lemon-drop-blueberry-scones.name: Lemon Drop Blueberry Scones
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a large baking sheet.
Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, 1 teaspoon lemon zest, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
Mix together lemon yogurt, butter, and egg in a separate bowl. Stir yogurt mixture into flour mixture until just moistened. Fold blueberries into mixture.
Drop batter by heaping tablespoons 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 15 to 18 minutes.
Meanwhile, stir together confectioners' sugar, lemon juice, and 1/2 teaspoon lemon zest in a small bowl until glaze is smooth.
Drizzle glaze over warm scones and serve.

lemon-oil.name: Lemon Oil
instructions: Bring lemon, garlic, oil, salt, and red pepper flakes to a very bare simmer in a small saucepan over low heat and cook (without stirring) until lemon is just tender, 20–30 minutes. Let cool; discard garlic.
Do Ahead: Lemon oil can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill.

lemon-sabayon-with-grapefruit.name: Lemon Sabayon With Grapefruit
instructions: Cut peel, including all white pith, from grapefruits with a sharp knife. Cut segments free from membranes and divide among 6 bowls.

Whisk together whole eggs, yolks, and sugar in a metal bowl until combined well, 1 to 2 minutes. Set bowl over a saucepan of simmering water and whisk until foamy, about 2 minutes. Add one third of lemon juice and whisk until thickened, about 1 minute. Add half of remaining lemon juice and whisk until thickened, about 1 minute. Repeat with remaining lemon juice. Continue cooking, whisking constantly, until thickened and an instant-read thermometer registers 77°C, 7 to 8 minutes more. Remove from heat and whisk in butter, 1 piece at a time, until incorporated. Cool slightly.
Spoon warm sabayon over grapefruit segments. Serve remaining sabayon on the side.

lemon-spritz-cookies.name: Lemon Spritz Cookies
instructions: Beat butter and cream cheese together in a bowl using an electric mixer until creamy. Mix in sugar until light and fluffy. Add egg yolk, lemon zest, lemon extract, and vanilla extract. Mix well. Add flour and salt gradually until dough is combined.
Shape dough into small logs; place a log into a cookie press and press out onto ungreased cookie sheets. Repeat with remaining dough logs.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 12 to 14 minutes.

lemon-lime-basil-shortbread-cookies.name: Lemon-lime Basil Shortbread Cookies

ingredients.item: Powdered sugar plus more for pressing cookies
Finely grated lemon zest plus 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Place flour, 1/2 cup powdered sugar, butter, basil, both zests, lemon juice, and salt in a food processor. Pulse until large, moist clumps form. Measure level tablespoonfuls of dough; roll between your palms to form balls. Place on a large baking sheet, spacing 2" apart. Lightly dust the bottom of a flat measuring cup with powdered sugar and press cookies into 2" rounds, dusting cup bottom with powdered sugar as needed to prevent sticking. Sprinkle tops of cookies with sanding sugar, if using.
Bake until edges are brown, about 14-15 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack; let cool.

lemon-mint-sauce.name: Lemon-mint Sauce
instructions: Whisk garlic, oil, parsley, mint, and lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Spoon half of sauce onto a platter. Place eggplants on top, season with salt, and spoon remaining sauce over. Let sit 30 minutes to let flavors meld.
DO AHEAD: Lemon-Mint Sauce can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

lentil-meatballs-recipe-lezzet.name: Lentil Meatballs Recipe

2. Take the water completely on the floor.
3. Add fine to the pot near the cover of the pot and wait for the tongue of the bulgurine (about 10 minutes).
4. Heat the olive oil in the pan, add grated onion and roast.
5. Add pepper and butter paste and add short time more roasting.
6. Add salt, tarp and cumin to the mixture.
7. Add roasted onion and salça mixture of lentilmek-bulgur mixture.
8. Add fresh onions and parsley and knead.

lobster-linguine-teleculinaria.name: Lobster Linguine
instructions: Get the lobster and cook it in salty water. Drain and dip in cold water. Then remove the brain and cut it into cubes.
Cook the dough in salt-tempered water, drain it, pass it through cold water and drain again.

In a large skillet, heat the olive oil and add finely chopped garlic, pasta, lobster, cream, chopped coriander, salt and pyri. Involve everything, letting it warm up. Remove from the fire and serve decorated with the basil stem.

loquat-ice-cream-teleculinaria.name: Loquat Ice Cream
instructions: Wash the nuts, remove their skin and lumps and cut them into cubs. Throw the fruit in a pot with yellow sugar, cinnamon stick and lemon juice. Take the low heat and when it starts boiling, count 10 minutes, stirring from time to time. Remove from pot and reserve.

Take the milk to the fire until it boils and then book it too. On the other hand, mix 200 g of white sugar with masena flour, yolks and boiled milk in yarn. Lie down on the pot used and light it to thicken, stirring continuously with a wire rod. Remove from the fire, mix about half of the fruit, previously drained, and let it cool.

Adherent film lining a rectangular shape or English cake type and book. Beat the cream with the rest of the sugar until it's firm. Mix them in the cream and then lie in shape. Take it to the freezer for at least 6 hours.
Remove the ice cream from the freezer, deform it and, at the time of serving, pour over the remaining fruit syrup, hot or cold and without the cinnamon stick. Serve the ice cream decorated with mint.

low-carb-naan-bread-teleculinaria.name: Low-carb Naan Bread

ingredients.item: Para a manteiga de alho:  ingredientes

instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. In a bowl, add the dry ingredients and wrap it very well. Add the hot water, yogurt and coconut oil and mix well.

Form a ball and let it rest for about 30 minutes. Then divide the dough into small portions and stretch them with the help of a roll. Place on a tray, lined with vegetable paper, and put it in the oven for 12 to 15 minutes.

Entretanto, prepare a manteiga de alho: numa frigideira, derreta a manteiga e junte os dentes de alho, previamente descascados e laminados, e os coentros picados. Mexa bem, deixe apurar e retire do lume.
Retire os naan do forno, pincele cada um com a manteiga de alho e sirva.
